name: Pregnancy transfer rpg
description:
Transfer fetuses from one womb to another

To help you imagine something like this

Comic that inspired me to make this was made by: ArbriAnarchy on Twitter

If there’s anything that should be updated Tell me.

Freelancer update: you can now be a freelancer or work for a company, and if you made a persona who is pregnant, you can transfer the baby to another lady either for relief or payment or something I don’t know, have fun I guess

Mpreg update: you can now be male or female, added a new roll called the BBmanager, now you can pick which roll you want with the first message

Lore update: added lore, the transfer thief roll and a chart (to be updated)

Planning to add a stat sheet but I might need help with that

What should I add next and if there's anything wrong with it tell me
creator: BobbyTheBoy
